member.name: F:nxm.sys.model.document.brick.xrate_info_provider.m_arrRequestCache
member.summary: request cache. note: we are storing request with requested rate date, not actual one! (in bank holiday days rates aren't published)

member.name: M:nxm.sys.data.tax_code.get_code(System.String,System.String,System.Decimal)
member.summary:
generates standard tax code for given country and rate for country="PL" and rate=23% result will be PL2300
country codes are matching ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (two letter)

member.name: M:nxm.sys.data.tax_code.get_code(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: generates special tax code for given country and kind EX - "exempt" ('zwolniony') NS - "no subject" ('nie podlega')

member.name: M:nxm.sys.data.tax_code.get_rate(System.String)
member.summary: compute tax rate for give tax code

member.name: M:nxm.sys.data.vat_rate.get_vat_code(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: returns nxm-vat-code for given country and rate level

member.name: F:nxm.sys.data.vat_rate._s_EUVATRates
member.summary:
EU VAT rates for 2024
source of tax-rates https://taxfoundation.org/data/all/eu/value-added-tax-2024-vat-rates-europe/ Super-reduced Rate (%) Reduced Rate (%) 1 and 2 Parking Rate (%) Standard Rate (%)

member.name: T:nxm.sys.data.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:nxm.sys.data.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:nxm.sys.data.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: F:nxm.sys.address_role.REGISTERED
member.summary: Registered office address (It is the address where the company is registered and is used for official purposes, such as submitting documents or correspondence with public administration authorities.)

member.name: F:nxm.sys.address_role.TRADING
member.summary: Trading address: This is the address where the company actually conducts its business.

member.name: F:nxm.sys.address_role.CORRESPONDENCE
member.summary: Correspondence address - where to deliver correspondence

member.name: F:nxm.sys.address_role.DELIVERY
member.summary: Delivery address - where to deliver goods

member.summary: Temporary Delivery Address - where to deliver goods (temporary

member.summary: total netto value in document currency
